hero.subtitle: In less than 7 minutes, you leave town and arrive at the famous Blue Lagoons! Licensed 4x4 vehicles, specialized local guides and 8 exclusive ecotourism and adventure routes.
hero.searchWhere: Where do you want to go?

about.label: About the Destination
about.title: Santo Amaro do Maranhão
about.p1: Discover Santo Amaro do Maranhão, the most sought-after tourist route and the closest gateway to the Lençóis Maranhenses National Park.
about.p2: The Lençóis Maranhenses are a priceless natural treasure, recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. In Santo Amaro, you find the rustic and cozy essence of the countryside, with a full range of inns and restaurants.
about.p3: We offer 8 exclusive routes of ecotourism, adventure and experience, including trekking, kayaking and the famous ATV ride. Enjoy the rich Maranhão cuisine, with typical dishes like the famous Malaysian shrimp.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your adventure.

items.q: What is the best time to visit the Lençóis Maranhenses?
items.a: The best time is between June and August, when the lagoons are full after the rainy season (January to May). However, you can find lagoons from May to November, depending on rainfall.

items.q: How to get to Santo Amaro do Maranhão?
items.a: The most common access is via São Luís (MA). From there, you can take a van transfer (4h30 trip) or rent a car. You can also arrive via Barreirinhas and then go to Santo Amaro by Toyota 4x4 (3h).

items.q: Do I need to be physically fit for the tours?
items.a: It depends on the route. 4x4 tours to the lagoons are accessible for all ages. Dune trekking requires moderate fitness, with 2h to 4h walks under the sun. We have routes for all profiles!
Yes! All our tours include pickup and return to your inn or hotel in Santo Amaro. Just provide the address when booking.
Yes. We offer free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour. After that, a 50% fee applies. In case of bad weather, we reschedule at no extra cost.
We accept PIX (5% discount), credit cards (up to 3 interest-free installments), bank transfer and cash. Payment can be made online at booking or in person.

items.q: Is it safe to swim in the lagoons?
items.a: Yes! The Lençóis lagoons are freshwater, shallow (usually up to 3m) and without currents. Water temperature is pleasant (25°C to 30°C). Our guides know the safest and most beautiful lagoons.

items.q: Can children participate in the tours?
items.a: Yes! We have family routes ideal for children. 4x4 tours and lagoons are perfect for families. For trekking and ATV, we recommend a minimum age of 12.

footer.desc: Lençóis Tour Experience is your gateway to the Lençóis Maranhenses. Strategically located in Santo Amaro, we offer the most authentic and safe experience in the region.
